personal.profileDescription: Your personal information is used to manage your account and improve your experience.
personal.securitySubtitle: We protect your personal data & never share it with third parties

security.changePasswordSubtitle: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long and contain a mix of uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and numbers.
security.recoveryEmailSubtitle: Update your recovery email address used for account recovery.
security.recoveryPhoneSubtitle: Update your phone number for SMS account recovery.
security.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All your personal data, accommodations, and past cleaning records will be permanently deleted.
security.accountSecureSubtitle: We do everything we can to protect your personal information.
security.deleteMyAccountSubtitle: Permanently delete your account with your all data

support.title: We are here to help you
support.subtitle: Do you have a question, a problem or a suggestion? Write to us, our team will answer you quickly.
support.subject: Subject
support.sentSuccess: Your message has been sent. Our team will get back to you soon.

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Welcome to Gestlio, the ultimate platform for managing your accommodations, cleanings, and communications all in one seamless dashboard. Our mission is to empower property hosts and cleaning professionals to connect, schedule, and collaborate effortlessly.
about.visionBody: We believe in a world where property management is fully automated, transparent, and built on trust. Whether you are managing a single apartment in Paris or a global portfolio, Gestlio provides the tools to ensure your guests always arrive to a spotless, welcoming environment.
about.outro: Founded in 2024, our team is dedicated to continuously improving the user experience, integrating secure payments, and offering world-class support for our community. Thank you for being a part of our journey.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.section1Body: By accessing and using Gestlio, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, please refrain from using our services.
terms.section2Body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. Any actions taken under your account are your sole responsibility. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during the registration process.
terms.section3Body: All payments processed through Gestlio are subject to our standard service fees. Payments are securely held in escrow and released to service providers upon successful completion of tasks.
terms.section4Body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Your continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.matterBody: We process your personal data with the utmost care and in full compliance with GDPR regulations. Your data is never sold to third parties.
privacy.collectionBody: We collect information you provide directly to us when creating an account, scheduling cleanings, or contacting support. This includes your name, email address, phone number, and physical addresses of your accommodations.
privacy.usageItem1: To provide, maintain, and improve our services.
privacy.usageItem3: To communicate with you regarding bookings, updates, and support.
privacy.usageItem4: To prevent fraud and enhance platform security.
privacy.retentionBody: You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time. Contact our support team to exercise these rights.

legal.title: Legal Notice
legal.disclaimer: The content on this website is provided for informational purposes only. Gestlio SAS assumes no liability for errors, omissions, or any damages arising from the use of the platform.
